    <p><strong>Edit as Text</strong></p>

    <p><a class="helplink" href="https://eviltester.github.io/grid-table-editor/site/docs/test-data/generate-to-file" target="_blank" rel=
<button class="icon-button" data-role="schema-mode-toggle" title="Toggle schema text mode">Edit as Text</button>
<input type="file" data-role="schema-file-input" accept=".txt,.schema,text/plain" aria-label="Load Schema File" hidden="">

<button class="icon-button shared-schema-drag-handle" type="button" data-action="drag" data-row-id="schema-row-2" title="Drag field to reorder" draggable="true" aria-label="Drag field to reorder"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="16" height="16" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="app-icon" aria-hidden="true" focusable="false"><circle cx="9" cy="6" r="1"></circle><circle cx="9" cy="12" r="1"></circle><circle cx="9" cy="18" r="1"></circle><circle cx="15" cy="6" r="1"></circle><circle cx="15" cy

<button class="icon-button" type="button" data-action="add" data-row-id="schema-row-2" title="Add field" aria-label="Insert field after this row"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="16" height="16" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="app-icon" aria-hidden="true" focusable="false"><path d="M5 12h14"></path><path d="M12 5v14"></path></svg></button>

<button class="icon-button" type="button" data-action="remove" data-row-id="schema-row-2" title="Remove field" aria-label="Remove field"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="16" height="16" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="app-icon" aria-hidden="true" focusable="false"><path d="M5 12h14"></path></svg></button>

<button class="icon-button" type="button" data-action="up" data-row-id="schema-row-2" title="Move up" aria-label="Move up" disabled=""><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="16" height="16" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="app-icon" aria-hidden="true" focusable="false"><path d="m5 12 7-7 7 7"></path><path d="M12 19V5"></path></svg></button>

<button class="icon-button" type="button" data-action="down" data-row-id="schema-row-2" title="Move down" aria-label="Move down" disabled=""><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="16" height="16" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="app-icon" aria-hidden="true" focusable="false"><path d="M12 5v14"></path><path d="m19 12-7 7-7-7"></path></svg></button>
<input type="text" data-field="name" class="" placeholder="Column Name" aria-label="Column Name" value="">

<select data-field="sourceType" class="" aria-label="Field type">
                    <option value="enum">enum</option>
                    <option value="literal">literal</option>
                    <option value="regex">regex</option>
                    <option value="domain" selected="">domain</option>
                    <option value="faker">faker</option>
                </select>
